boundary: one-way source-project glTF presentation import only; no live engine bridge, no embedded runtime, no decompiled source, no gameplay logic translation, no trusted Studio write path

normalization.deterministicStateOwner: Rust data plane state-hash primary; perceptual render secondary

nativeScene.logicAuthority: 2D deterministic Ouroforge state; glTF presentation cannot mutate gameplay truth

fidelityRows.reason: geometry primitive data imported as presentation skeleton
custom shader/extension must be baked or re-authored; not translated
unsupported glTF extension is recorded as a fidelity gap, not silently dropped

reDerivationTasks.reason: logic is behavior-bearing or source-engine-specific; M97 does not translate it
reDerivationTasks.eraRInput: observed behavior + interrogated intent + captured oracle + deterministic state expectations

reDerivationTasks.reason: physics is behavior-bearing or source-engine-specific; M97 does not translate it
reDerivationTasks.eraRInput: observed behavior + interrogated intent + captured oracle + deterministic state expectations

reDerivationTasks.reason: shader is behavior-bearing or source-engine-specific; M97 does not translate it
reDerivationTasks.eraRInput: observed behavior + interrogated intent + captured oracle + deterministic state expectations

perceptualRenderSecondary.method: SSIM/pixel-diff tolerance over normalized presentation render
perceptualRenderSecondary.threshold: fixture-defined tolerance; never cross-machine bit hash

oracleRule: Nothing is claimed ported without captured acceptance evidence and a passing oracle; presentation imports are best-effort with honest fidelity rows.
